title: NodeBB Segment 05
summary: Late-stage development segment of the NodeBB forum platform covering a large batch of incremental improvements. Key themes include: privilege system enhancements, extensive schema upgrade scripts for version transitions, OpenAPI documentation expansion, client-side module modernization, API v3 refinements, async local storage introduction, controller and template updates for new admin features, and continued internationalization across all locales.
instructionPreview: `/workspace/requirements/` contains every requirement as a separate file. Each file describes one change request. Read them all, implement every one. Order does not matter, but some changes depend on others.
instruction:
You are an autonomous engineer. The repository at /workspace is at an earlier state of a real-world project.

`/workspace/requirements/` contains every requirement as a separate file. Each file describes one change request. Read them all, implement every one. Order does not matter, but some changes depend on others.

moduleDag.description: Late-stage development segment of the NodeBB forum platform covering a large batch of incremental improvements. Key themes include: privilege system enhancements, extensive schema upgrade scripts for version transitions, OpenAPI documentation expansion, client-side module modernization, API v3 refinements, async local storage introduction, controller and template updates for new admin features, and continued internationalization across all locales.

nodes.label: Internationalization / Locales
nodes.description: Translation JSON files for all supported locales. PRs add new keys for API responses, privilege labels, analytics pages, and refine existing translations across dozens of languages.

nodes.label: Client-Side JavaScript
nodes.description: Browser-side modules including admin panels, API helpers, topic/post interactions, account management, and utility modules. PRs modernize API v3 request handling, add folder management in uploads, and improve infinite scroll behavior.

nodes.label: Privileges System
nodes.description: Permission checking and assignment for categories, topics, posts, users, and admin actions. PRs extend granular privilege gates and improve privilege copying between categories.

nodes.label: Schema Upgrades
nodes.description: Versioned database migration scripts for transitions between NodeBB releases. PRs add 47 migration scripts covering privilege changes, data normalization, and feature flag updates.

nodes.label: Core Server Modules
nodes.description: Top-level server files including app.js, webserver, notifications, analytics, search, events, and utility modules. PRs introduce async local storage, improve analytics sub-pages, and refine API response translation.

nodes.label: OpenAPI Specification
nodes.description: Swagger/OpenAPI YAML schemas documenting the NodeBB API. PRs expand write API documentation and add new endpoint schemas for admin and user operations.

nodes.label: Server-Side Templates
nodes.description: Tpl template files for admin analytics drilldowns, privilege pages, settings screens, and user management. PRs add new admin sub-pages and update existing layouts.

nodes.label: HTTP Controllers
nodes.description: Express route handlers for admin, API, topics, users, and categories. PRs add analytics drilldown controllers and improve API error handling.

nodes.label: Topics Module
nodes.description: Topic management including creation, tags, events, merging, and thumbs. PRs add topic event logging, improve tag validation, and fix merge edge cases.

nodes.label: Installation System
nodes.description: Setup wizard and default configuration. PRs update default settings for new features and improve the initial setup flow.

nodes.label: User Module
nodes.description: User data layer including authentication, profile, settings, and notifications. PRs improve user search, consent management, and profile data access patterns.

nodes.label: Database Abstraction
nodes.description: MongoDB and Redis database drivers. PRs improve connection management, add utility methods, and fix edge cases in sorted set operations.

nodes.label: Socket.IO Handlers
nodes.description: Real-time event handlers for posts, topics, admin, and messaging. PRs refine socket endpoint security and add new admin socket methods.

nodes.label: Build System / Meta
nodes.description: Asset compilation and configuration management. PRs improve template compilation and settings cache handling.

nodes.label: Express Middleware
nodes.description: Request processing middleware for authentication, headers, and maintenance mode. PRs improve header handling and add middleware for new API routes.

nodes.label: Posts Module
nodes.description: Post creation, editing, deletion, and queue management. PRs improve post queue workflows and fix edge cases in post operations.

nodes.label: Plugin System
nodes.description: Plugin loading and hook management. PRs improve plugin data handling and hook execution patterns.

nodes.label: Route Definitions
nodes.description: Express route registration for API v3, admin, and static assets. PRs add new API route namespaces and reorganize route files.

nodes.label: Categories Module
nodes.description: Category management including privileges, ordering, and topic listing. PRs improve category privilege copying and data access.

nodes.label: Project Configuration
nodes.description: Root-level files including Dockerfile, loader.js, renovate.json, and CI/CD configuration. PRs update CI settings and dependency management.

edges.label: user data stored via database abstraction
server core loads and manages plugins
